zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross於1396年7月出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾丁瓦爾時，他的父親Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles36歲，母親Mariota Leslie33歲。他於1425年與Elizabeth Seton of Gordon在英國蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1439年被列為justicar of scotland。他去世於1449年5月7日在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭洛-爾福特洛斯福特洛斯 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross was born in July 1396, in Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles, was 36 and his mother, Mariota Leslie, was 33. He married Elizabeth Seton of Gordon in 1425, in Clackmannanshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. In 1439, his occupation is listed as justicar of scotland. He died on 7 May 1449, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Fortrose Cathedral, Fortrose, Ross-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross est né en juillet 1396, à Dingwall, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mariota Leslie, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Seton of Gordon en 1425, à Clackmannanshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. En 1439, sa profession de son indiquée est justicar of scotland. Il est décédé le 7 mai 1449, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Fortrose Cathedral, Fortrose, Ross-shire, Écosse.

de.Western Isles, Strathclyde, Scotland: Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross im Juli 1396 in Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles 36 und seine Mutter Mariota Leslie 33. Er hat 1425 in Clackmannanshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Elizabeth Seton of Gordon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1439 ist sein Beruf als justicar of scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 7. Mai 1449 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Fortrose Cathedral, Fortrose, Ross-shire, Scotland begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Seton of Gordon nel 1425, nel Clackmannanshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1439, la sua occupazione è indicata come justicar of scotland. Morì il 7 maggio 1449, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Fortrose Cathedral, Fortrose, Ross-shire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Rossが1396年7月にスコットランドロス-シュアイアディングワルで生まれた時，父Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Islesは36歳，母Mariota Leslieは33歳であった。1425年にイギリススコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアでElizabeth Seton of Gordonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1439年，職業はjusticar of scotlandと記録されている。彼は1449年5月7日に故郷で52歳で死去し，スコットランドロス-シュアイアフォートローゼフォートローゼ カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.Western Isles, Strathclyde, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar
ko.lifeSummary: Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross(이)가 1396년 7월 스컷랜드 로스-실르 딩월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mariota Leslie(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1425년 영국 스코틀랜드 클랙먼아실르에서 Elizabeth Seton of Gordon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1439년, 그의 직업은 justicar of scotland이었다. 그는 1449년 5월 7일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 로스-실르 포트로즈 포트로즈 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross nasceu em julho de 1396, em Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mariota Leslie, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Seton of Gordon em 1425, em Clackmannanshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1439, sua profissão aparece como justicar of scotland. Ele faleceu em 7 de maio de 1449, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Fortrose Cathedral, Fortrose, Ross-shire, Scotland.

ru.Western Isles, Strathclyde, Scotland: Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross родился июль 1396 г. в местности дингвалл, росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariota Leslie, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Seton of Gordon в 1425 г. в местности клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1439 году он работал по профессии justicar of scotland. Он умер 7 мая 1449 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности фортрос кэтедраль, фортрос, росс-шир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross nació en julio de 1396, en Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mariota Leslie, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Seton of Gordon en 1425, en Clackmannanshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1439, su ocupación registrada era justicar of scotland. Murió el 7 de mayo de 1449, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Fortrose Cathedral, Fortrose, Ross-shire, Scotland.
